title: ArmadAI Starter Pack Configuration
description: Configuration file for ArmadAI starter packs (pack.yaml). Defines a curated bundle of agents, prompts, skills, and optional orchestration.

name.title: Pack name
name.description: Unique identifier for this starter pack (e.g. 'rust-dev', 'pirate-crew'). Used as the directory name when installed.

description.title: Pack description
description.description: Human-readable description of what this pack provides.
examples: Rust development suite with linting, testing, and documentation agents
Pirate development crew — a captain coordinator and their specialized crew

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: List of agent names included in this pack (required, minimum 1).

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.description: List of prompt fragment names included in this pack (optional, default: empty).

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: List of skill names included in this pack (optional, default: empty).

OrchestrationConfig.title: Orchestration Configuration
OrchestrationConfig.description: Optional configuration for multi-agent orchestration patterns (hierarchical, blackboard, ring, or direct). When specified in a pack, these settings are inherited by projects that install the pack.

pattern.title: Orchestration pattern
pattern.description: Pattern for multi-agent execution: direct (single agent), blackboard (shared state), ring (token-passing), hierarchical (pyramid topology), or auto (auto-detect).

coordinator.title: Coordinator agent
coordinator.description: Name of the coordinator agent (required for hierarchical pattern).

teams.title: Team definitions
teams.description: Team topology for hierarchical orchestration. Each team has optional coordinator and list of agents.

max_depth.title: Maximum delegation depth
max_depth.description: Maximum depth for coordinator delegation chain (default: 5).

max_iterations.title: Maximum iterations
max_iterations.description: Maximum total iterations across all agents (default: 50).

max_laps.title: Maximum laps (ring)
max_laps.description: Maximum token laps for ring pattern (default: 3).

consensus_threshold.title: Consensus threshold
consensus_threshold.description: Consensus threshold (0-1, default: 0.75). Used for voting in ring and hierarchical patterns.

token_budget.title: Global token budget
token_budget.description: Global token budget across all agents (default: 100,000).

TeamConfig.title: Team Configuration
TeamConfig.description: Definition of a team in hierarchical orchestration topology.

coordinator.title: Team coordinator
coordinator.description: Name of the team coordinator (optional). If absent, agents report directly to the project coordinator.

agents.title: Team agents
agents.description: List of agent names in this team.
